extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked final kilometers of Luz Ardiden, dropped VINGEGAARD and CARAPAZ in closing meters for third stage win
tactical_patterns: GAUDU piloted by MADOUAS attacked Tourmalet early, gained 1:00 on descent before Luz Ardiden neutralization revealed UAE isolation tactics
INEOS led final climb pace at first-ever 2021 stage win attempt, CAVENDISH survived Tourmalet revealing green jersey strategy shift
POGACAR attacked final 2km after MICHAL UAE pacework, VINGEGAARD had KUSS/MAS support but couldn't counter when companion attacked

rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: went over Tourmalet first with 35km remaining, opened minute gap on descent showing descending aggression absent earlier
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: survived Tourmalet in main bunch to collect green jersey points, tactical shift prioritizing classification over stage exits
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: lost 9 minutes to winner, definitively dropped from GC contention after holding fourth overall
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: moved up GC to fourth with companion attack attempt on Luz Ardiden, one of better climbing days
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: moved up GC rankings after good climbing performance, capitalizing on ROGLIC collapse
rider_signals.INEOS Grenadiers: negative: led final climb for first stage win attempt but POGACAR attack immediately neutralized their pace control
